author: fix-pendingresponse
content: VDD R2 NOT CONVERGED — Verdict: Mediocre. 3 Major issues remain: (1) pytest-postgresql missing from environment-unpinned.yaml — next repin drops it, (2) unconditional 'from pytest_postgresql import factories' at module level makes ALL storage tests require pg, (3) fixture discovery fragility — pg fixtures in fixtures.py not conftest.py. Also: response_status as BigInteger is semantically wrong (HTTP codes are 3 digits), silent except Exception: pass on rollback. Needs R3.
